meeting_title: Cobalt Plant Industrial / Voxel pilot discussion

safety_use_cases.label: Centralized safety monitoring and real-time dispatch
safety_use_cases.description: Use site cameras and AI with control-center operators to detect unsafe conditions/behaviors across dispersed zones and immediately notify the responsible safety officer to intervene.

evidence.quote: When we are putting these cameras, these cameras will support us how we're going to put operators in the project control center or safety control centers.
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: Those people will support the safety officer in case they detect any unsafe conditions or behavior.
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: They immediately call the zone officer.
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: I want to prevent these things from happening.
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Vehicle–pedestrian proximity (man–machine interface) alerts
safety_use_cases.description: Detect workers dangerously close to moving equipment (e.g., within ~2 meters) and alert to prevent runovers and near misses.

evidence.quote: Man-machine interface, the equipment and the people inside.
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: The equipment, when they move, they don't see them, and they kill them.
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: It detect whatever person that comes in like two meters or something from the equipment, and accordingly it will detect and it will give an alarm or something.
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: So like lifting activities and stacking and storage, people walking around, vehicles moving around people, the vehicle, the machine human interface is there.
evidence.speaker: Lennon Sawyer <fake.lennon.sawyer@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

safety_use_cases.label: PPE compliance monitoring (including hot work PPE)
safety_use_cases.description: Monitor for required PPE such as gloves, goggles/face shields, hard hats, and vests, with emphasis on hot-work areas.

evidence.quote: Yeah, I think the PPE is an obvious one.
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: gloves, eyeglasses, goggles, face shield. Helmets, Vests.
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: So here, obviously, our focus would be on like, not maybe specifically hard hats, but this one will be like gloves or face shields, those types of things.
evidence.speaker: Lennon Sawyer <fake.lennon.sawyer@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Access/egress safety and restricted area intrusion
safety_use_cases.description: Define and monitor no-pedestrian and no-obstruction zones, walkways/crossings, and detect entry into restricted areas.

evidence.quote: I don't know if you guys have anything on access and egress.
evidence.speaker: Lennon Sawyer <fake.lennon.sawyer@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: Yeah, so we can define, like, no pedestrian zones where people should never be.
evidence.speaker: Dakota Kendrick <fake.dakota.kendrick@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: We can do a no obstruction zone, so, like, nothing should be blocking this area.
evidence.speaker: Dakota Kendrick <fake.dakota.kendrick@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: Restricted means that there are areas where no one is, for example, allowed to enter these locations.
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Confined space entry and lone-worker detection
safety_use_cases.description: Detect confined space entry and flag when a person enters alone to trigger an immediate response.

evidence.quote: we can go for the confined space if there are people there, one guy alone entering a confined space, fire, PPEs.
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Working at height compliance and lifting/falling object risks
safety_use_cases.description: Monitor for working at height without scaffolding or full-body harness and identify lifting/falling object hazards.

evidence.quote: be careful there is man-machine interface, or people working tight without scaffolding, or no full body harness, or there is a fire, for example, that will support this guy
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: there are a lot of vests and hazards, falling objects, lifting, walking at height, many, many issues that you can tackle.
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Zone- and shift-based alert routing in remote areas
safety_use_cases.description: Route safety alerts by zone and shift to the responsible person through available delivery methods, with accommodations for remote areas.

evidence.quote: In Zone A, we can make sure that we're sending alerts to just those leaders in that area at that time.
evidence.speaker: Morgan Hayes <fake.morgan.hayes@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: I think the best thing would be some tool that gives the safety officer a message with the relevant context.
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: But what came to mind is what happens if coverage is limited?
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: Do you have an alternative delivery approach for remote situations?
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: There are alternate delivery approaches we could consider in that case.
evidence.speaker: Morgan Hayes <fake.morgan.hayes@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: And whenever something happens in that zone, for example, zone A, it goes directly to the person responsible.
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Drone-based remote inspection and auditing
safety_use_cases.description: Integrate AI with drones to conduct remote site walkthroughs from the office to audit teams and inspect conditions.

evidence.quote: What about if we do have drones? If we do have drones, can you integrate the system to these drones?
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

evidence.quote: it's a good idea that even from here, if we want to do like a tour or something and make sure that everything in place, I audit my team, I inspect if they're doing their job, I can, I come from here, from my office, I just fly this drone and I just go in my, in my, in my walkthrough.
evidence.speaker: Brennan Walker <fake.brennan.walker@cobaltplantindustrial.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Drone-based remote inspection and auditing
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Integrate AI with drones to conduct remote site walkthroughs from the office to audit teams and inspect conditions.

evidence.quote: What about if we do have drones? If we do have drones, can you integrate the system to these drones?

evidence.quote: it's a good idea that even from here, if we want to do like a tour or something and make sure that everything in place, I audit my team, I inspect if they're doing their job, I can, I come from here, from my office, I just fly this drone and I just go in my, in my, in my walkthrough.
